evidence.quote: At the event “The Briefing: AI for Science” earlier this week, Anthropic announced Claude Science, a new “AI workbench for scientists” that pulls fragmented tools and datasets into one environment, and generates figures and visuals.

In the last year, the company has been actively hiring biologists and building its own wet labs, and as of writing it has several live applications hiring for life sciences roles.
